signals.headline: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Trump's indefinite extension of the Iran ceasefire, announced today (April 22, 2026), has removed the Hormuz geopolitical premium, driving a broad crypto rally with **Bitcoin topping $77K** (up 2.2% daily), **Ethereum up 0.7% to $2,390**, and **XRP up 1.5% to $1.45**—all confirmed in real-time market data[1].
matched_markets: Will Trump agree to Iranian enrichment of uranium in April?
Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by end of April?

signals.headline: Strategy Discloses $2
signals.raw:
Strategy Discloses $2.54B Bitcoin Buy | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Corporate buyer Strategy revealed a $2.54 billion BTC purchase today, lifting its holdings past 815,000 coins and absorbing three times April's global miner supply, which forced shorts to unwind and boosted **Ethereum** and **XRP** alongside BTC's breakout from a two-month range[1].  
These twin catalysts—geopolitical de-escalation
matched_markets: Ethereum Up or Down - April 23, 2:30AM-2:35AM ET
